prompt: You ought not to help Madonna
hint: Identify WHO is being commanded or permitted (the agent, marked with underline) and WHAT action they must/may do.
explanation: 'Ought' is the obligation operator O. 'Ought NOT to help' puts the negation INSIDE the obligation: O∼H͟u m — it is obligatory that you not help Madonna. (Contrast ∼OH͟u m, 'it isn't obligatory that you help'.)
